summary: Phase 3 testing completed. All 29 backend API tests pass. Fixed 1 bug in generate_maintenance_jobs endpoint. Frontend pages (Customer Portal, Maintenance Agreements, Gantt Chart) working correctly.

fixed.issue: Job creation failed with Pydantic validation errors - missing job_type, title fields and invalid status 'scheduled'
fixed.fix: Updated Job creation to use correct fields: job_type='Maintenance', title='Scheduled Maintenance - {agreement_number}', status='pending'

issues: Shows 'Coming Soon' placeholder - Projects list page not implemented, but Gantt chart at /projects/{id} works correctly

action_items: Consider implementing Projects list page to show all projects (currently placeholder)
Add data-testid attributes to other form inputs for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: Customer Portal login inputs needed data-testid attributes for reliable testing - added to login form

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, all features work except Projects list is placeholder)

seed_data_creation: Created test maintenance agreements, projects with phases, and customer accounts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested: Google Maps routing (Haversine fallback), Maintenance Agreements CRUD + job generation, Install Projects with Gantt chart, Customer Portal (register/login/magic link/service requests), Offline Sync. All APIs working. Customer Portal login requires data-testid selectors for reliable Playwright testing.

google_maps_routing.notes: Uses Haversine fallback when no API key configured (MOCKED)

maintenance_agreements.notes: CRUD operations, job generation, due renewals all working

gantt_chart.notes: Project phases displayed on timeline, navigation works

customer_portal.notes: Register, login, magic link (MOCKED - token returned in response), service requests all working

offline_sync.notes: Batch sync, conflict resolution, status tracking all working

mocked_apis: Google Maps Directions API - uses Haversine fallback calculation
Email sending for magic links - token returned in response for demo
